verdicts.missing: Drops profuse degree and the quality-of-abundance reading; carries only that many things exist.
verdicts.reason: It gives a generic quantity statement, not the quality of exceptionally abundant amount.

verdicts.missing: Replaces abundance of things with abundance of kinds of a thing.
verdicts.reason: Many kinds is diversity, not wealth in the sense of profuse abundance.

verdicts.missing: Recasts wealth as a kind of very big many things rather than a quality of profuse abundance.
verdicts.reason: Its genus is malformed and it incorrectly makes size criterial.

verdicts.missing: Adds a location-exclusive distribution and drops the quality of profuse abundance.
verdicts.reason: Wealth does not mean that abundance exists here but not in many other places.

verdicts.missing: Adds social belief and bigness, while carrying only generic abundance.
verdicts.reason: The asserted public judgment and kind-of-big-thing analysis are not part of this sense.
